content.method: Use the study or pilot design stated in the migrated v1 research agenda.
content.question: A regional pilot phase-out of 8-year gimnázium entry with propensity-score-matched comparison regions, tracking achievement and segregation outcomes over 5-7 years, to test whether Poland's/Finland's effect sizes replicate in Hungary (S3).
content.why_it_matters: It can change the comparison of transformation choices.
